calendar.matters:
CASE MANAGEMENT CONFERENCE
Off Calendar Nov-01-2011 Off Calendar

Default Prove-Up Hearing.
Off Calendar Oct-18-2011 Granted Per Written Order
MINI MINUTES: This cause came on regularly as scheduled this day for Default Prove-Up Hearing.
Judge: Tomar Mason, Clerk: Kevin Dougherty, Reporter: Brenda Fields, CSR #7235.

Plaintiff Lisa Kirkman was present in pro per, placed under oath and examined.
Mark Carton, a witness for plaintiff, was placed under oath and examined.
No appearance by defendant Ruth Crossen.
Default was entered against defendant on October 14, 2011.
Doe defendants were dismissed on June 16, 2011.

After hearing the evidence presented, and good cause appearing, the Court rules in favor of Plaintiff Robert Schoelzel, Jr., and against the Defaulted Defendant Barr Lumber Company, Inc. as follows:

Principal - $2,000.00.
Prejudgment Interest - $858.73.
Costs - $270.00.

Total - $3,128.73.

Judgment was submitted to and signed by the Court.

CASE MANAGEMENT CONFERENCE
Off Calendar Aug-05-2011 Continued To Nov-18-11 At 10:30 A.M. In Dept 610
